title: Infinite loop....
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 99.99);
key_bug_features: Dropping tables after inserting into them
